This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Animated JXL with repetition count 0 plays exactly once.
  assert_equals: repetitionCount must match expected 0 but got 1
[FAIL] Animated JXL with repetition count 1 plays exactly twice.
  assert_equals: repetitionCount must match expected 1 but got 2
Harness: the test ran to completion.
